Defendants Barrel Cellar Llc, Jim Howell, Matthew Weese, Sarah Weese'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Noel Margaret Lawrence, Lindsay Tusk And Quince Pacific Avenue, Llc
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Tufts, 801.415.3000 for Defendants/Moving parties The Barrel Cellar LLC, Jim Howell, Matthew Weese and Sarah Weese.
Scott McLeod, 415.765.6299 for Cross-Defendants Lindsay Tusk and Quine Pacific Avenue, LLC.
Rober Staley, 415.398.6392 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Noel Lawrence.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: Defendants Barrel Cellar LLC, Jim Howell, Matthew Weese, Sarah Weese'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Noel Margaret Lawrence, Lindsay Tusk And Quince Pacific Avenue, LLC is DENIED. Motion for summary adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is denied. There are triable issues of fact as to waiver; whether removed items belonged to the lessor or the lessee and whether those items were permanent or moveable; whether the option to extend the lease was exercised; the extent of damage to the property; whether the non-circumvention agreement covered the purchase the lease and purchase of business only or included the lease of real property. Prevailing parties to prepare an order in compliance with CCP 437c(g) consistent with this tentative rulings. The Court takes the issue of mitigation regarding the complaint under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
